title: tobi/qmd — local markdown search engine with MCP + CLI + BM25/vector/LLM reranking
summary: Local-first markdown search engine by Tobi Lütke (Shopify CEO). TypeScript CLI + MCP server + SDK with hybrid retrieval (BM25 + vector + HYDE, fused via RRF with position-aware reranking). Structure-aware chunking (H1-H6 + code fence scoring, squared distance decay). Uses node-llama-cpp for local GGUF models — no cloud dependency. Formal EBNF query DSL with typed sub-queries. Ships as a Claude Code plugin via marketplace.json with skill frontmatter that disables auto-invocation on destructive ops. 21K stars in 4 months; multi-runtime CI (Node + Bun); exact dep pins; 0.92 test-to-source ratio.
creator_view: See creator-view.md. Core knowledge: hybrid retrieval with position-aware RRF blending, structure-aware markdown chunking algorithm, formal EBNF query grammar, and plugin-distribution mechanics via Claude Code marketplace manifest. For SoNash: the skill frontmatter discipline (allowed-tools + disable-model-invocation) is a stronger enforcement pattern than prose guardrails. For JASON-OS: marketplace.json + MCP-as-CLI-subcommand is the distribution template.

candidates.name: Claude Code plugin manifest (marketplace.json)
candidates.description: Plugin manifest bundling MCP server + skills for 'claude plugin marketplace add' installation. Enables JASON-OS portability.

candidates.name: Skill frontmatter: allowed-tools + disable-model-invocation
candidates.description: Frontmatter declarations enforcing tool access restrictions and preventing auto-invocation on destructive skills.

candidates.name: MCP server as CLI subcommand (3 transports)
candidates.description: MCP server via 'qmd mcp' subcommand. Stdio, HTTP foreground, HTTP daemon with PID file management. Reference for JASON-OS Domain 02a.

candidates.name: Query DSL with typed sub-queries (EBNF grammar)
candidates.description: Formal EBNF grammar for search queries with typed sub-queries (lex/vec/hyde) and intent disambiguation. 182-line spec.

candidates.name: Scored markdown chunking algorithm
candidates.description: Break point scoring H1=100 down to line=1 with squared distance decay. 900 tokens/chunk, 15% overlap. Applicable to SoNash content analysis.

candidates.name: RRF + position-aware blending
candidates.description: Reciprocal Rank Fusion with k=60, original query 2x weight, top-rank bonus, position-aware blend 75/60/40% for ranks 1-3/4-10/11+.

candidates.name: Fixture-based eval harness with difficulty tiers
candidates.description: Easy/medium/hard query classification with expected docs. Precision@k, recall, MRR, F1 across 4 backends.

candidates.name: Release skill with disabled auto-invocation
candidates.description: Release workflow with disable-model-invocation: true. Enforces exact dep pinning. Keep a Changelog format.

candidates.name: node-llama-cpp for privacy-first local inference
candidates.description: Node wrapper for llama.cpp. Runs GGUF models locally with GPU acceleration. Relevant to SoNash privacy-first vision.

candidates.name: AST-aware code chunking via tree-sitter
candidates.description: Tree-sitter parsing for TS/JS/Python/Go/Rust. Chunks at function/class/import boundaries.

candidates.name: Daemon mode with PID file management
candidates.description: HTTP server --daemon flag. PID at ~/.cache/qmd/mcp.pid. Idle context disposal after 5 min.

candidates.name: LoRA SFT on small LLMs for domain tasks
candidates.description: LoRA rank 16, alpha 32, Qwen3-1.7B, 5 epochs. 92% eval score. $1.50 per run on HF A10G.

candidates.name: HuggingFace Jobs for cheap cloud training
candidates.description: hf jobs uv run executes SFT for ~$1.50. Self-contained scripts.

candidates.name: Rule-based reward function for RL
candidates.description: 5-dimension scoring. Deterministic, no LLM judge. Suitable as RL signal.

candidates.name: Nix flake with home-manager module
candidates.description: flake.nix with homeModules.default for NixOS users. programs.qmd.enable option.

candidates.name: Fine-tuning before exhausting prompt engineering
candidates.description: qmd tried GEPA prompt optimization before SFT. Order matters - prompt first, then fine-tune.

candidates.name: Caret ranges in reproducible-install packages
candidates.description: Exact pins required for platform-binary shipping packages. SoNash uses carets.

candidates.name: Skill without invocation gate on destructive ops
candidates.description: Destructive skills should declare disable-model-invocation. SoNash skills rely on prose guardrails.

adoption_verdict: Extract patterns. Creator-lens value is the primary draw: plugin manifest pattern (JASON-OS-relevant), skill frontmatter discipline (SoNash-relevant), EBNF query DSL grammar, position-aware RRF blending, structure-aware chunking. Adoption as a tool: low priority — SoNash does not currently need a local markdown search engine. Creator-lens T1 score, adoption-lens T3.
